meta.purpose: Audit every fact-bearing conclusion across Phases 14-22 for completeness (Source + Evidence + Confidence). Flag anything missing. Grade each phase's evidence quality. This report gates Phase 24 ranking — conclusions marked NEEDS_MANUAL_REVIEW cannot contribute to final scores without human verification.
meta.qc_standard: Every conclusion requires: source_document + authority_level + confidence_score + exact_language OR flag as NEEDS_MANUAL_REVIEW
meta.summary: Core hospitalization, surgery, ER, and coinsurance data is L1-confirmed for 7 of 9 plans. Atlas America remains L5/L6 evidence only — scores will carry uncertainty penalty. WorldTrips carrier transition (CE-001) means VisitorSecure and Atlas America Phase 14 evidence must be re-verified against TMHCC Certificates before final ranking confidence can exceed 70.

qc_flags: QC-001: COVID coverage — confirmed covered but sub-30-day trip trap requires Certificate verification of exact language
QC-002: Master Policy effective date 2024-10-02 — verify Certificate in raw_documents matches this date
QC-003: I-94 requirement for claims — verify from Certificate; may be administrator requirement only

needs_manual_review: All benefits — TMHCC Certificate re-verification required (CE-001)
qc_flags: QC-004: CRITICAL — Lloyd's Certificate may be superseded by TMHCC Certificate (May 29, 2025). All evidence entries carry CE-001 uncertainty. Confidence scores for VisitorSecure reduced by 15 points across all evidence until TMHCC Certificate verified.
QC-005: Home Country Coverage confirmed REMOVED — update evidence.json to reflect this

needs_manual_review: ALL major benefits — Certificate not obtained
qc_flags: QC-006: CRITICAL — Atlas America has no L1 or L2 evidence. All evidence is L5 (brochure) or L6 (marketing). Cannot be ranked above confidence 45 on any dimension until TMHCC Certificate obtained.
QC-007: Home Country Coverage confirmed REMOVED — update evidence if present in evidence.json

needs_manual_review: Certificate of Insurance (L1) not obtained — all evidence is L2
qc_flags: QC-008: All INF Elite X evidence is L2 (Policy Wording). Certificate (L1) not obtained. Confidence scores capped at 80 max until L1 obtained.
QC-009: Pre-cert requirement confirmed (search result) but penalty not confirmed — flag as NEEDS_MANUAL_REVIEW

confirmed_benefits: Acute onset limits by age ($75K non-cardiac, $50K cardiac ≤69)

phase_audits.method_note: Simulations derived from L1/L2 evidence. Confidence scores per scenario reflect underlying document authority. All simulations include denial risk ranges, not point estimates — appropriate epistemic humility.
qc_flags: QC-010: VisitorSecure simulations — reduce confidence by 15 points for all scenarios pending TMHCC Certificate (CE-001)
QC-011: Atlas America simulations — confidence scores were already capped at 50; retain with explicit NEEDS_MANUAL_REVIEW flag
QC-012: Rehabilitation facility status UNCONFIRMED for all 9 plans — must not be scored as covered in ranking
QC-013: Home Nursing status UNCONFIRMED for 7 of 9 plans (only PAP/PAPL confirmed L1)
QC-014: OT and Speech Therapy UNCONFIRMED for all 9 plans
QC-015: INF Elite X unlimited lookback — 'reasonably prudent person' standard interpretation varies. Flag as NEEDS_MANUAL_REVIEW for legal edge cases.
QC-016: VisitorSecure full pre-existing definition — TMHCC Certificate needed (CE-001)
QC-017: INF Elite X URL discrepancy (page titled 'first-health-ppo' but confirmed UHC Options) — must verify from actual ID card before final ranking
QC-018: Atlas OON rate unconfirmed
QC-019: SC dual-network (PHCS) requires verification from Certificate — confirmed L5 only
QC-020: Safe Travels claims deadline UNCONFIRMED — ranking claims score must carry uncertainty penalty
QC-021: INF Elite X claims deadline UNCONFIRMED
QC-022: Atlas America claims deadline UNCONFIRMED
QC-023: Pre-cert service lists for 6 of 9 plans UNCONFIRMED
QC-024: CE-001 (WorldTrips carrier transition) confirmed and documented. Immediate action: obtain TMHCC Certificates for Atlas America and VisitorSecure.
QC-025: CE-003 (CAG Master Policy Oct 2024) — verify raw_documents Certificate date matches

cleared_with_uncertainty_penalty.penalty: All confidence scores reduced by 15 points pending TMHCC Certificate re-verification (CE-001)
Evidence grade D — no L1/L2 documents obtained. Score reflects L5/L6 evidence only. Atlas America cannot rank above position 8 with current evidence quality.
